tracks.title: Pursuit
tracks.reason: The relentless, monophonic, percussive synth sequence is the perfect model for the Interrogator Bass pattern and timbre.

tracks.title: Bleed
tracks.reason: The drum MIDI provides a masterclass in complex polyrhythmic layering over a 4/4 pulse, perfect for training the interaction between The Grid and The Clock.

tracks.title: Angel
tracks.reason: This track's MIDI shows how to build immense energy through layering and subtraction over a static bassline, a direct structural reference for the INTERROGATION section.
